name: gtme-skills
displayName: GTME Skills — GTM Engineering Skills for AI Agents
description: Production-ready agent skills for GTM engineers: cold outreach, prospecting, web scraping, voice training, and GTM context capture.
author: lucasvibecoder

skills.name: gtm-context
skills.description: Captures company, ICP, GTM motion, tech stack, channels, and metrics into a reusable context file that other skills read automatically.

skills.name: email-writer
skills.description: Write effective emails for B2B sales and deal management — cold outreach, deal follow-ups, warm intros, trigger routing, and sequence building.

skills.name: text-trainer
skills.description: Analyze writing samples and generate reusable voice profiles that other skills use to match a person's voice.

skills.name: prospect-finder
skills.description: Find people at companies and get their verified email addresses using the Prospeo API.

skills.name: web-scraping
skills.description: Extract structured data from websites, single-page applications, and mobile APIs using a 9-method decision tree.
